zh.lifeSummary: Iras Ap Gwin是Gwin Ap Collwin的兒子，於大約1120年出生。他至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Iras Ap Gwin是Gwin Ap Collwin的儿子，于大约1120年出生。他至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: Gwin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: from gwyn ‘fair, white’, also sometimes ‘white-headed; favorite’. This word was widely used as a personal name in the Middle Ages. It may also be a nickname for a person with fair hair or a noticeably pale complexion. See also Winn .

variants.name: Guin
meanings: French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Wino, a short form of various compound names formed with the element win ‘friend’.

variants.name: Gwynne
meanings: Irish: possibly shortened and altered from Mac Coinn, see McGuinn , a variant of McQuinn . However, it is far more likely to be the Welsh name (see 1 above), established in Ireland since the 16th century.

variants.name: Gwyn
meanings: Welsh (Glamorgan) and Irish: variant of   Gwin   or   Gwynne  .

variants.name: Gwynn
meanings: Welsh (Welsh Marches or southern Wales) and Irish: variant of   Gwin   or   Gwynne  .

variants.name: Winn
meanings: English (northern) and Welsh: variant of   Wynn  .

nameMeanings.name: Iras
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Greek iris ‘rainbow’ it was borne in Greek mythology by a minor goddess, one of the messengers of the gods, who was so named because the rainbow was thought to be a sign from the gods to men. In English her name was used in the 16th century to denote both the flower and the coloured part of the eye, on account of their varied colours. In modern English use the name is often taken as being from the word for the flower, but it is also in use in Germany, where there is no such pattern of flower names.

nameMeanings.name: Ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

en.lifeSummary: Iras Ap Gwin was born about 1120 as the son of Gwin Ap Collwin. He had at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Iras Ap Gwin est né environ 1120, fils de Gwin Ap Collwin. Il a eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Iras Ap Gwin wurde um 1120, als Sohn von Gwin Ap Collwin geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Iras Ap Gwin è nato il circa 1120 come figlio di Gwin Ap Collwin. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: Iras Ap Gwinは約1120年にGwin Ap Collwinの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Iras Ap Gwin(은)는 대략 1120년 Gwin Ap Collwin의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Iras Ap Gwin nasceu aproximadamente 1120 filho de Gwin Ap Collwin. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Iras Ap Gwin родился около 1120 г. Его отца звали Gwin Ap Collwin. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Iras Ap Gwin nació aproximadamente 1120 como hijo de Gwin Ap Collwin. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo.
